plans.name: Quality-First Filler Extraction
plans.description: Maximizes detection accuracy and transition smoothness by using optimized audio extraction, word-level refinement with buffers, and frame-accurate re-encoding.

nodes.name: planning-with-files
nodes.purpose: Initialize project tracking and document the specific filler words and duration parameters for the workflow.
nodes.downstream_hint: Provides the roadmap for all subsequent processing steps.

usage_hints.audio-prep: Follow the plan for file naming conventions.

nodes.name: audio-extractor
nodes.purpose: Extract 16kHz mono audio from the source video to provide Whisper with the cleanest signal for accurate timestamping.
nodes.downstream_hint: High-quality audio input for transcription.

usage_hints.transcribe-fillers: Use this WAV file instead of the MP4 for better word-level accuracy.

nodes.name: whisper-transcription
nodes.purpose: Detect filler words with word-level timestamps using a high-accuracy model (e.g., 'small' or 'base').
nodes.downstream_hint: Raw filler word timestamps.

usage_hints.refine-segments: Use the JSON array to calculate start/end durations.

nodes.name: filler-word-processing
nodes.purpose: Convert point-timestamps into duration-based segments with 0.05s buffers and merge overlapping clips for natural transitions.
nodes.downstream_hint: Cleaned list of segments to be extracted.

usage_hints.stitch-video: Use these merged segments for the final video assembly.

nodes.name: ffmpeg-video-editing
nodes.purpose: Extract and concatenate segments using re-encoding (libx264/aac) to ensure frame-accurate cuts and seamless audio.
nodes.downstream_hint: Final deliverable: a smooth video of all filler words.

plans.name: Efficiency-First Rapid Processing
plans.description: Prioritizes speed by transcribing the video directly with the 'tiny' model and using stream-copy for near-instant video concatenation.

nodes.name: whisper-transcription
nodes.purpose: Directly process the video file using the 'tiny' model for the fastest possible detection of filler words.
nodes.downstream_hint: Filler word timestamps for immediate processing.

usage_hints.fast-stitch: Pass the timestamps directly to the editing tool.

nodes.name: ffmpeg-video-editing
nodes.purpose: Extract filler clips and concatenate them using '-c copy' to avoid re-encoding time.
nodes.downstream_hint: Final deliverable produced with minimal CPU overhead.

plans.name: Simplicity-First Minimalist Workflow
plans.description: Reduces the workflow to the absolute irreducible core: detection and extraction.

nodes.name: whisper-transcription
nodes.purpose: Identify filler words and generate the required /root/annotations.json file.
nodes.downstream_hint: Essential data for the final video.

usage_hints.core-stitch: Use the word and timestamp data to define clips.

nodes.name: ffmpeg-video-editing
nodes.purpose: Stitch the identified filler clips into the final output file.
nodes.downstream_hint: Final video satisfying the task requirements.
